gap-002.summary: A declined / failed-payment error state is a named pain point in the call, but no error-state frame exists in the design references — the designs stop at the happy path. A missing design that blocks the payment step and later becomes a design task.

gap-003.summary: The order-confirmation screen is described in the call as 'the payoff' (order number, ETA, 'we're on it') but no confirmation frame appears in the design references (table stops at the place-order CTA) and it is absent from the product notes. A post-checkout design gap.
